zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter de Corbet於大約1275年出生在英國武斯特斯爾金頓時，他的父親Roger Corbet44歲，母親Nesta Vale40歲。他於大約1310年與Ela de Audley在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾奧德利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1361年11月3日在英國英格蘭享年87歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter de Corbet于大约1275年出生在英国武斯特斯爾金頓时，他的父亲Roger Corbet44岁，母亲Nesta Vale40岁。他于大约1310年与Ela de Audley在英国英格兰斯塔福爾奧德利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1361年11月3日在英国英格兰享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter de Corbet was born about 1275, in Kington, Worcestershire, England, his father, Roger Corbet, was 44 and his mother, Nesta Vale, was 40. He married Ela de Audley about 1310, in Audley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 3 November 1361, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter de Corbet est né environ 1275, à Kington, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Corbet, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Nesta Vale, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Ela de Audley environ 1310, à Audley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 3 novembre 1361, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peter de Corbet um 1275 in Kington, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Corbet 44 und seine Mutter Nesta Vale 40. Er hat um 1310 in Audley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Ela de Audley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 3. November 1361 im Alter von 87 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Peter de Corbet è nato il circa 1275 nel Kington, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, Roger Corbet, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Nesta Vale, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Ela de Audley circa 1310, nel Audley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 3 novembre 1361, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter de Corbetが約1275年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアキントンで生まれた時，父Roger Corbetは44歳，母Nesta Valeは40歳であった。約1310年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアアウドリーでEla de Audleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1361年11月3日にイギリスイギリスで87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter de Corbet(이)가 대략 1275년 영국 워스스터실르 킨그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Corbet(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Nesta Vale(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 오들리에서 Ela de Audley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1361년 11월 3일 영국 잉글랜드에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter de Corbet nasceu aproximadamente 1275, em Kington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Corbet, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Nesta Vale, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Ela de Audley aproximadamente 1310, em Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 3 de novembro de 1361, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter de Corbet родился около 1275 г. в местности кингтон, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Corbet было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Nesta Vale, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Ela de Audley около 1310 г. в местности аудли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 3 ноября 1361 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peter de Corbet nació aproximadamente 1275, en Kington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Corbet, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Nesta Vale, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Ela de Audley aproximadamente 1310, en Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 3 de noviembre de 1361, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 87 años.
